changes: Level cap raised to 80.
A fixed set of role actions has been assigned to all jobs. Players will learn role actions as they level and will no longer be required to select a subset of these actions.
Maximum MP for all jobs has been fixed at 10,000.
TP has been removed.
Enmity gained for certain healing actions has been reduced.
The time frame within which players must execute actions to continue or complete combos has been extended.
Charged actions implemented (allowing multiple executions in quick succession via charges).
Unique recast timers implemented for certain weaponskills and spells.
Umbral Ice now also reduces the MP cost of ice spells, with the effect increasing with each stack gained.
Piety attribute effect changed from increasing Maximum MP to increasing MP regeneration rate.
Limit break gauge fill rate from healing actions reduced.
Limit break gauge will no longer fill when non-healer jobs use healing actions.
Pet actions have been removed and incorporated into player actions.
Pets can no longer be targeted by player or enemy actions.
Pets will no longer be displayed in the party list.
Pet HP will no longer be displayed when targeted.
Attacks performed by a pet will generate enmity for the player who summoned it.
PvP traits have been removed.
PvP actions for all jobs have been adjusted.
Additional actions are now adjusted based on current job's role.
It is no longer possible to manually remove enhancements applied to your character.
TP has been removed.
The range of melee attacks has been increased from 3 to 5 yalms.
The global cooldown time of actions has been increased from 2.3 to 2.4 seconds.
HP recovery rate outside of combat has been increased from 10% to 20% of maximum HP.
MP recovery rate in combat has been increased from 200 to 250.
MP recovery rate outside of combat has been increased from 400 to 500.
Players will now be granted temporary immunity to knockback and draw-in effects after being affected by them.
